===[[Pokémon Pokopia]]===
Though he is not referred to by name, Silver is mentioned in the [[Human Records|Human Record]] "Information Wanted", which recounts his theft of one of [[Professor Elm]]'s [[first partner Pokémon]] at the start of [[Pokémon Gold and Silver|Pokémon Gold, Silver]], [[Pokémon Crystal|Crystal]], [[Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver Versions|HeartGold, and SoulSilver]]. Reading this record rewards {{poko|Ditto}} with the Chic outfit, which resembles Silver's clothing.
